titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar

segments: ه عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار- رحمه اللّه- فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن بن أحمد بن الوليد- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار.
arabic.text: ه عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار- رحمه اللّه- فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن بن أحمد بن الوليد- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan ibn Ahmad ibn Al-Walid - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan ibn Ahmad ibn Al-Walid - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar.
